venues.name: The Fillmore Silver Spring

boxOfficeInfo.openHoursDetail: The Box Office is open 2 hours prior to general admission doors for every event. Wednesday-Friday the Box Office opens at 2pm if there is an event that night.
boxOfficeInfo.acceptedPaymentDetail: The Fillmore Silver Spring is a cashless venue. Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, and Apple Pay are all accepted. There is a cash to card ATM located inside the venue.
boxOfficeInfo.willCallDetail: Will Call tickets can be picked up from the Box Office.

venues.parkingDetail: Downtown Silver Spring has several public parking options. The closest garages to the venue are Garage 2 and Garage 61 listed here: https://www.montgomerycountymd.gov/DOT-Parking/Parking-Facilities/SilverSpringPLD.html Additionally, The Fillmore Silver Spring has partnered with ParkWhiz to offer other easy and reliable options to book parking.

venues.name: Jefferson Theater

boxOfficeInfo.openHoursDetail: The box office will be open 2 hours before any performance and during regular box office hours every Thursday and Friday from 10:00am - 2:00pm. The box office accepts Visa, Master Card, American Express and Discover. There is a $1-$2 box office fee for every ticket sold, depending on ticket price and venue.
boxOfficeInfo.willCallDetail: Please present your valid photo ID at the box office for picking up tickets.

venues.parkingDetail: We do not have any on site parking, however, we recommend that our patrons park in the Water Street Parking Garage (100 and 200 blocks of East Water Street) which is a very short walk to the theater. Please note that the garages close at certain times, therefore plan accordingly to avoid your vehicle being locked inside until the garage reopens the following day.
venues.accessibleSeatingDetail: For General Admission or GA Floor with Reserved Balcony shows, patrons requesting accessible seating should purchase a ticket at the preferred price level and contact us at 434.245.4980 to make arrangements. For Fully Reserved shows, accessible seating is initially available at every price level while supplies last, and may be viewed by clicking the "Show accessible seating" filter on the event ticketing page.

generalInfo.childRule: Unless otherwise posted the Jefferson is all ages. We do suggest a guardian accompany any patrons under the age of 14. Children 3 and under are not required to have a ticket to Jefferson Theater shows as long as their parents have a general admission ticket. If the parents have a reserved seat ticket, then all accompanying children must also have their own ticketed seat. We strongly encourage close supervision and ear protection for our youngest show attendees.

venues.name: The Southern Café & Music Hall

boxOfficeInfo.openHoursDetail: The box office will be open 2 hours before any performance. The box office accepts Cash, Visa, Master Card, American Express and Discover. A $1.00 -$2.00 per ticket service charge will apply to all in-person advance purchases. Tickets are also available at the box office of our sister venue, The Jefferson Theater. That box office accepts Visa, Master Card, American Express and Discover. A $1.00 - $2.00 per ticket service charge will apply to all in-person advance purchases. The Jefferson cannot accept cash purchases for other venues.
boxOfficeInfo.willCallDetail: Please present your valid photo ID at the box office for picking up tickets.

venues.parkingDetail: Due to our urban location we do not provide parking on site. However, there are several options within a few blocks of the venue that we can recommend: • Surface lots serviced by ParkMobile o 3 lots at Water Street and 1st Street (Zones 96301, 96303, 2788) o 1 lot at Market Street btwn 1st and 2nd Streets (Zone 96302) • Water Street Garage - 200 East Water Street
venues.accessibleSeatingDetail: The Southern Café & Music Hall offers accessible accommodations to patrons with ADA requirements. Our Café, venue and select bathrooms are fully accessible. The majority of our events are general admission therefore, there is not a specific ADA ticketing option. If you have special requests, simply ask our staff once you arrive or call us at 434.977.5590 and we will be glad to assist you.

generalInfo.childRule: Unless otherwise posted The Southern is all ages. We do suggest a guardian accompany any patrons under the age of 14. Children 3 and under are not required to have a ticket to The Southern shows as long as their parents have a general admission ticket. If the parents have a reserved seat ticket, then all accompanying children must also have their own ticketed seat. We strongly encourage close supervision and ear protection for our youngest show attendees.

venues.name: Capital One Hall

boxOfficeInfo.openHoursDetail: Current Hours Mondays CLOSED unless a performance is scheduled Tuesdays 10 AM to 2 PM Wednesdays 10 AM to 2 PM Thursdays 10 AM to 2 PM Fridays 10 AM to 2 PM Saturday CLOSED unless a performance is scheduled Sunday CLOSED unless a performance is scheduled Box Office will open 4 hours prior to all performances. Check https://www.capitalonehall.com/faq for up to date information.
boxOfficeInfo.acceptedPaymentDetail: Ticket Fee: $2 per ticket purchased at the box office
boxOfficeInfo.willCallDetail: *Box Office will open 4 hours prior to all performances.*

venues.parkingDetail: General Parking costs $15.00 and is located in the Visitor and Associate Parking Garage (1680 Capital One Drive South, McLean, VA 22102). This parking facility is located to the left of Capital One Center's C2 Building. C2 is a short and walkable distance to the front doors and box office of Capital One Hall. Please be advised the walk is outside and not under any covering - be prepared for the weather. Premium Parking is available for $45.00 and is located in the Hotel/Event Garage (1625 Capital One Drive North, Tysons, VA 22102). This parking facility is attached to Capital One Hall and offers exclusive entry access directly from the Hotel/Event Garage.
venues.accessibleSeatingDetail: Parking: Handicap parking is available in both the Visitor and Associate Garage and the Hotel/Event Garage Drop-off: Patrons are able to be dropped off in front of the theater. Sign Language Interpreters: Please email boxoffice@capitalonehall.com with request for sign language interpretation. All requests for Sign language interpreters must be submitted no later than 10 business days prior to show date. Assisted Listening Devices: Available free of charge at coat check in the main lobby. Purchasing Accessible Seating: Accessible seating can be bought through Ticketmaster.com and seat locations are listed below. When you hover over the seat it will bring up a little box with an ADA and Companion icons. Also, after you purchase your seats please send an email to boxoffice@capitalonehall.com with your seat location and we will ensure the appropriate seats are removed to accommodate a wheelchair. Left Orchestra: Row P Seats 1-3 and 7-9/Row X Seats 1-3, 7-9 and 13-15 Right Orchestra: Row P Seats 2-4 and 8-10 Left Balcony 1: Row EE Seats 1-3 and 7-9 Left Balcony 2: Row AA Seats 1-3 and 7-9 Right Balcony 2: Row AA Seats 2-4 and 8-10

generalInfo.generalRule: Prohibited Items • Oversized bags (maximum 12x16x12), backpacks, or boxes • Propane and propane powered vehicles, equipment and displays • Fireworks or other incendiary devices • Guns, knives, electronic shock devices, chains, clubs or other weapons that could be used to harm another individual or property • Sticks (including selfie-sticks) or poles • Markers or stickers (any other adhesive items) • Projectiles (including beach balls and Frisbees) • Lit cigars, cigarettes, e-cigarettes, or the like • Controlled substances of any kind unless pursuant to a doctor's prescription (Name on prescription must match name on photo ID) • Cans, bottles, coolers or other similar containers • Helium or other lighter than air filled balloons • Recording devices (video, audio or photographic) • Laser pens or other laser light-type pointing devices • Signs, posters, or banners • Skateboards, Skates (roller or in-line), or scooters • Noise making devices (horns, whistles, etc.) • Umbrellas (non-retractable) • Outside food and drinks • Additional items may be prohibited on a show by show basis
generalInfo.childRule: Everyone needs a ticket regardless of age.

events.name: Boy George & Culture Club
events.info: Welcome to The Theater at MGM National Harbor. Complimentary parking is available on a first come, first serve basis and The Theater is located adjacent to the Conservatory. Suite amenities are ONLY available to guests who book the entire suite (minimum of 13 guests) directly through an MGM National Harbor suites representative. Contact us at suites@mgmnationalharbor.com to hear about our group suite offerings.

venues.name: The Theater at MGM National Harbor

boxOfficeInfo.openHoursDetail: Box Office Hours The box office opens three hours prior to the showtime of an event, and is closed on days when there is no event. Please note: The box office does not sell tickets over the phone. Tickets purchased in person are subject to applicable service fees. The property does not sell VIP or presale tickets, and public sales begin the day after the Ticketmaster general public on sale date. For information about Suites, please contact us at suites@mgmnationalharbor.com.
boxOfficeInfo.acceptedPaymentDetail: Cash, Visa, MasterCard, American Express and Discover. All credit card purchases require a photo ID.
boxOfficeInfo.willCallDetail: Will call orders can be picked up by the account holder at the box office on the day of the event. Please bring a matching picture id, the credit card used to make the purchase, and the order number.

venues.parkingDetail: There is a multi-story parking garage connected to MGM National Harbor. Parking is free for all guests. Please visit mgmnationalharbor.com for more information on all transportation and parking options.
venues.accessibleSeatingDetail: To better accommodate your needs, The Theater at MGM National Harbor has requested that all special seating accommodations be solicited only through their representatives. Please contact a MGM National Harbor box office representative via the number below for further help with your ticket purchase. Advance ticket purchase may be required. This includes, but is not limited to, visual impairment, accessibility needs, interpreter requests, etc... If you need additional assistance, please email regionalticketing@mgmresorts.com.

generalInfo.generalRule: All guests are subject to search. Guests must retain ticket in order for re-entry. No tobacco products or e-cigarettes may be used in the Theater. Please visit the venue webpage for a list of prohibited items at the venue.
generalInfo.childRule: Children 3 & under do not require a ticket for admission.

ada.adaCustomCopy:
To better accommodate your needs, The Theater at MGM National Harbor has requested that all special seating accommodations be solicited only through their representatives. This includes, but is not limited to, visual impairment, accessibility needs, interpreter requests, etc…

* Box office information is subject to change.

That box office accepts Visa, Master Card, American Express and Discover. A $1.00 - $2.00 per ticket service charge will apply to all in-person advance purchases. The Jefferson cannot accept cash purchases for other venues.
boxOfficeInfo.willCallDetail: Please present your valid photo ID at the box office for picking up tickets.

venues.parkingDetail: Due to our urban location we do not provide parking on site. However, there are several options within a few blocks of the venue that we can recommend: • Surface lots serviced by ParkMobile o 3 lots at Water Street and 1st Street (Zones 96301, 96303, 2788) o 1 lot at Market Street btwn 1st and 2nd Streets (Zone 96302) • Water Street Garage - 200 East Water Street
venues.accessibleSeatingDetail: The Southern Café & Music Hall offers accessible accommodations to patrons with ADA requirements. Our Café, venue and select bathrooms are fully accessible. The majority of our events are general admission therefore, there is not a specific ADA ticketing option. If you have special requests, simply ask our staff once you arrive or call us at 434.977.5590 and we will be glad to assist you.

generalInfo.childRule: Unless otherwise posted The Southern is all ages. We do suggest a guardian accompany any patrons under the age of 14. Children 3 and under are not required to have a ticket to The Southern shows as long as their parents have a general admission ticket. If the parents have a reserved seat ticket, then all accompanying children must also have their own ticketed seat. We strongly encourage close supervision and ear protection for our youngest show attendees.

events.name: Earlybirds Club (21+)
events.info: This is a General Admission - Standing Room Only Event. This show is 21+. A valid physical government ID is required for entry. All support acts are subject to change without notice. Doors for this event open at 6:00PM. Show starts at 6:00PM. 10% of ticket proceeds benefit My Sister's Place, which shelters, supports and empowers survivors of domestic violence and their children, Note: By purchasing these tickets, you are consenting to be photographed for promotional purposes. People of all backgrounds and identities are encouraged to attend all of our events. For accessible accommodations, please purchase a ticket and call 301-960-9999. venues.name: The Fillmore Silver Spring

boxOfficeInfo.openHoursDetail: The Box Office is open 2 hours prior to general admission doors for every event. Wednesday-Friday the Box Office opens at 2pm if there is an event that night.
boxOfficeInfo.acceptedPaymentDetail: The Fillmore Silver Spring is a cashless venue. Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, and Apple Pay are all accepted. There is a cash to card ATM located inside the venue.
boxOfficeInfo.willCallDetail: Will Call tickets can be picked up from the Box Office.

venues.parkingDetail: Downtown Silver Spring has several public parking options. The closest garages to the venue are Garage 2 and Garage 61 listed here: https://www.montgomerycountymd.gov/DOT-Parking/Parking-Facilities/SilverSpringPLD.html Additionally, The Fillmore Silver Spring has partnered with ParkWhiz to offer other easy and reliable options to book parking.

ada.adaCustomCopy:
To better accommodate your needs, The Fillmore Silver Spring has requested that all special seating accommodations be solicited only through their representatives. Please contact a Fillmore Silver Spring representative for further help with your ticket purchase.*   Advance ticket purchase may be required.

* Box office information is subject to change.
ada.adaHours: The Fillmore Silver Spring Box Office is open on event days only, 2 hours prior to doors opening for the event.

events.name: Friday Night Fever: The NY Bee Gees
events.info: The New York Bee Gees Tribute Show is comprised of some of Long Island New Yorks most versatile and exceptionally talented players. The band includes present or former members of well known, world renown acts including The Alan Parsons Project, Happy Together Tour, Meatloaf, Queen, Blue Oyster Cult, Riot, Hermans Hermits, Enrique Iglesias, The Rippingtons and more. The band offers all of the classic 70s disco hits from Stayin Alive to Night Fever while embracing their early works such as To Love Somebody, Ive Got To Get A Message To You and Massachusetts. The New York Bee Gees delivers songs from every decade of the Bee Gees catalog with a stunning production, powerful vocals and the professional stage presence to fill any venue.
events.pleaseNote: We are a cashless venue at Concessions & Box Office. Only debit or credit cards will be accepted. Lobby Doors & Box Office Open 1 hour prior to showtime for ticketing support concessions will also be open. Ticket Scanning & Seating will begin 30 minutes prior to showtime. For more details about our venue please go to mdtheatre.org

ticketLimit.info: There is an overall 8 ticket limit for this event for online sales. For groups of 8 more people, please contact our Box Office directly by phone at 301-790-2000.

boxOfficeInfo.openHoursDetail: In Advance: Tue - 12noon - 6:00pm Wed - 12noon - 5:00pm Thu - 12noon - 6:00pm Fri - 12noon - 5:00pm Day of Show: 1 hour prior to event The theatre is closed on Mondays during the summer.

venues.parkingDetail: Two parking garages located within 1 block of the theatre. A&E Parking Deck and University District Parking Deck. Metered spaces also available.

generalInfo.generalRule: No Video No flash photography No outside food or drinks No large bags or backpacks permitted. All other bags/purses subject to search. boxOfficeInfo.phoneNumberDetail: The Box Office does not have a phone number. All inquiries should be emailed to hgbri-boxoffice@hrhcbristol.com
boxOfficeInfo.openHoursDetail: The Box Office is open Wednesday to Friday 10am to 4pm. Saturdays 12pm to 8pm. The Box Office will also open at 12pm on all show days.
boxOfficeInfo.acceptedPaymentDetail: The Box Office will accept Mastercard, American Express, Visa, Discover, & Hard Rock Unity Points; they do not accept cash.
boxOfficeInfo.willCallDetail: Will call can only be picked up on the day of the event after 12pm. Tickets held for will call must be picked up with a proper ID.

venues.accessibleSeatingDetail: All wheelchair accessible areas are located in Sections 101, 102 and 103.

generalInfo.generalRule: MUST BE 21+ TO ATTEND. A valid photo ID is required for entry. Please visit our website for acceptable forms of identification. All ticket purchases are final and may be subject to cancellation without refund. Hard Rock Live is located within Hard Rock Hotel & Casino Bristol. All tickets grant entry into venue. Hard Rock Live is a smoke-free venue. Smoking, including vapes, is prohibited. For a complete list of venues rules, please visit our website. The Box Office is located in the northwest corner of the casino floor. Not valid for persons enrolled in the Virginia Voluntary Exclusion Program or persons otherwise excluded from Hard Rock Casino. If you or someone you know has a gambling problem and wants help, call 1-800-GAMBLER.

events.name: The Cast Of Beatlemania Performing Hits From Every Era
events.info: THE CAST OF BEATLEMANIA, founded by Lenie Colacino, PAUL of the original hit Broadway show, BEATLEMANIA, captures the brilliance of The Beatles performing their greatest hits in an incredible LIVE show. The band takes audiences on the musical journey of the Fab Four, from their humble start at The Cavern Club and The Early Years of The British Invasion through the Sgt. Pepper Era to the iconic Abbey Road.
events.pleaseNote: Please Note: If the Elevation 27 parking lot is full, please park in Walmart. All other lots subject to tow. General Admission Tickets are standing room only. Elevated Seating Tickets are first come first seated. Reserved Seating Tickets at Tables and Booths include admission to the show. You may be seated with other guests. All Table and Booth Tickets are asked to comply with a minimum food purchase of $10.00 per guest.

venues.parkingDetail: We do not have any on site parking, however, we recommend that our patrons park in the Water Street Parking Garage (100 and 200 blocks of East Water Street) which is a very short walk to the theater. events.name: Steven Curtis Chapman's - SPEECHLESS Tour '26 - Roanoke, VA
events.info: Back by popular demand, Steven Curtis Chapman is bringing SPEECHLESS The Tour to even more cities in the spring of 2026! The tour continues the celebration of 25 years of the iconic Speechless album, which featured seven #1 radio hits including the title track Speechless. Experience the album played front to back in its entirety for the very first timefeaturing favorites like Dive, Be Still and Know, Fingerprints of God, and morealong with additional hits and special surprises. Dont miss your chance to see SPEECHLESS The Tour as it returns this spring!SCHEDULE (subject to change):5:30pm - VIP doors open5:45pm - Early Entry doors open6:00pm - General Admission doors open7:00pm - Show beginsIMPORTANT INFORMATION: If you need assistance with your order or have questions regarding this event, please reach out to tickets@tprlive.co and our team will be happy to assist you.Attendees over the age of 2 will be required to have their own ticket. If attendee arrives after specified ticket type door time, participation in ticket type benefits can not be guaranteed. In addition, It is not guaranteed that attendees entire party will be seated together. Ticket prices are subject to change based on demand and/or when purchased at the door. All purchases are non-refundable.By purchasing a ticket and voluntarily entering and being present at this event, you (and each person in your party) acknowledge and agree to accept complete and sole responsibility for the inherent risk of possible exposure to communicable diseases such as COVID-19. Please consider that there is an inherent risk of exposure to COVID-19 or other infectious diseases in any place where people are present. We cannot ensure or be held liable that the premises are free from contagions.For the protection of our ticket buyers and event participants, third party selling of tickets will not be permitted for any TPR. event pages. There has been an increase in fraudulent and unlawful scams around concert ticket sales online. To ensure everyone has an official ticket to the event through proper channels, we recommend you purchase your tickets through the official ticketing outlet for your event. Any purchases through 3rd parties or 3rd party ticketing sites are not guaranteed by TPR. and limits your ability to receive up to date information for the event and any necessary assistance.
